items.title: Melbourne woman suffers acute liver failure after using knock-off drug

children.content: Megan Hancocks bought a drug labelled as the peptide compound retatrutide in cash from a beautician. Within a week of her second dose, she was in acute liver failure.

items.title: First case of deadly H5 bird flu confirmed in Australia

children.content: The virus, found in a migratory bird in Esperance, raises concerns for the poultry industry despite Australia having spent years preparing for such a biosecurity breach.

items.title: A diabolical Iran deal reveals the Trump administration's delusions

children.content: Just as Netanyahu's claims to be able to influence Trump have now become a burden to him, Trump's limited capacity to influence Netanyahu spells just as much trouble for peace in the Middle East.

items.title: Steve Irwin 'wouldn't have wanted this': Australia Zoo calls police on traditional owner

items.title: 'Everything's just so wrong': Inside the country town that turned to One Nation

items.title: What does it mean for a nation to be a 'monoculture'?

items.title: The immersive Indigenous language class where English is left at the door

items.title: Mother holds onto hope her son's killer will be found after remote WA murder
